name: Broiled Chicken Oregano
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Oregano, fresh or 1 t dried
recipeInstructions:
Several hours before serving - or the day before, if time allows - rub the chicken pieces with the garlic and place them in a deep china or earthenware bowl. Combine the marinade ingredients (lemon juice, olive oil, salt, pepper) and garlic clove, then pour over the chicken. Cover the bowl and refrigerate the chicken. Turn the chicken pieces occasionally.
When ready to cook, preheat the broiler to its highest setting. Arrange the chicken pieces on the broiler rack and baste with a little of the melted butter mixture (mixture of olive oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and oregano). Baste often. Broil the chicken 3-4 inches from the heat for 5-8 minutes per side, ensuring that juices run clear when pierced with a sharp knife.
Remove to serving platter, pour reserved basting mixture over the chicken breasts, and serve immediately. This is also good done on a BBQ.
